summary.key_theme: 儘管 ServiceNow 具備強勁的 AI 成長動能與合作夥伴關係，但近期受 Anthropic 新產品競爭威脅及市場對 AI 泡沫的擔憂影響，股價面臨短期波動。

bullish.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Sold Off on AI Fears but Long-Term Competitive Edge Remains Intact
bullish.reason: Montaka Global Investments 指出，儘管短期股價因 AI 恐慌下跌，但 ServiceNow 的長期競爭優勢依然穩固，適合長期投資。

bullish.title: NOW's Subscription Growth Continues: Is Long-Term Momentum Secured?
bullish.reason: 公司訂閱營收成長達 21 %，且 AI 採用率持續上升，顯示其核心業務動能強勁，具備長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Nvidia's CEO Just Delivered Fantastic News for Investors in This Beaten‑Down AI Stock
bullish.reason: Nvidia 執行長黃仁勳對代理型 AI (Agentic AI) 的看好，間接為 ServiceNow 的技術路徑背書，增強市場信心。

bullish.title: Vonage And ServiceNow Launch Integrated Voice And AI Solution
bullish.reason: 與 Vonage 深度整合，將即時 AI 與語音功能嵌入企業工作流程，有助於提升客戶服務與 IT 支援效率，擴大產品護城河。

bullish.title: Zenity Announces Partnership With ServiceNow to Operationalize AI Agent Risk Reduction in SecOps
bullish.reason: 與 Zenity 合作強化 AI 代理的風險控管，提升企業資安防護能力，進一步鞏固其在企業級 AI 市場的地位。

bullish.title: Why Citizens Remains Bullish On ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW)
bullish.reason: Citizens 重申對 ServiceNow 的看好，並將其列為 2026 年獲利成長最佳的 5 檔科技股之一。

bullish.title: Should You Invest in ServiceNow (NOW) Based on Bullish Wall Street Views?
bullish.reason: 華爾街券商平均建議 (ABR) 維持在「買入」評級，顯示機構投資人對其基本面仍持正面看法。

bullish.title: Is ServiceNow, Inc. (NOW) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 市場出現看多論點，認為在近期回調後，該股具備吸引力。

bearish.title: LiveRamp, Sprout Social, 8x8, Intuit, and ServiceNow Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: Anthropic 宣布其 Claude AI 助理具備控制電腦能力，引發市場對傳統軟體公司被取代的擔憂，導致股價下跌。

bearish.title: Here's Why ServiceNow (NOW) Fell More Than Broader Market
bearish.reason: 股價單日下跌 5.68 %，表現弱於大盤，顯示投資人對其估值與 AI 競爭壓力的敏感度提高。

bearish.title: ServiceNow and Salesforce Fall 5%: Is the Market Mispricing Both NOW and CRM?
bearish.reason: 與 Salesforce 同步下跌，反映出市場對企業軟體板塊在 AI 轉型期的估值修正壓力。

bearish.title: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow: “I Think the Stock’s Going to Be in for a Little Bit More Turbulence Than It Already Has Been”
bearish.reason: 知名評論員 Jim Cramer 警告該股短期內將面臨更多波動，建議投資人保持謹慎。

bearish.title: Why ServiceNow Stock Was Drifting Lower Today
bearish.reason: 再次強調 Anthropic 的新產品對軟體產業造成的心理衝擊，導致股價承壓。

bearish.title: Has Market Weakness Created A Fresh Opening In ServiceNow (NOW) Stock?
bearish.reason: 探討近期股價疲軟是否為買點，暗示目前股價處於「艱難時期」，投資人信心不足。

neutral.title: Why AI Won’t Kill the Entry-Level Job
neutral.reason: CFO Gina Mastantuono 反駁 AI 將導致入門職位消失的觀點，強調 AI 是輔助工具，旨在穩定市場對 AI 負面影響的預期。

neutral.title: Getting Value from AI Today
neutral.reason: CFO 分享如何從生成式 AI 中獲取價值，屬於企業經營層面的經驗分享，對股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: MongoDB vs. ServiceNow: Which AI Software Stock Has Greater Upside?
neutral.reason: 對比 MongoDB 與 ServiceNow 的成長潛力，屬於產業分析，無明確多空傾向。
